specs.title: cp-000: Replies indented with ml-4
cp-001: Enter key submits comment or reply without Shift epreventDefault blocks newline
cp-002: Comments stored via document-comments-local localStorage functions NOT database
cp-003: Comment user ID is hardcoded as local-user
cp-004: Clicking a comments quoted text calls scrollToComment which sets editor text sel
cp-005: New comment input at bottom of sidebar is hidden when inline comment form is act
cp-006: toCitationAuthors empty or whitespace-only author string maps to family Unknown
cp-007: toCitationAuthors author with comma eg Smith John splits on first comma first pa
cp-008: toCitationAuthors author without comma splits on spaces last word is family rest
cp-009: toCitationAuthors single-word author name maps to family name given
cp-010: buildResearchReference creates ID ref-research-stableKey where stableKey is trim
cp-011: Research reference sets type article CSL type article-journal and year defaults
cp-012: Default document title initialized as Untitled Document
cp-013: Document load failure without doc error set to Failed to load or create document
cp-014: Document load network error error set to Failed to load document Please try agai
cp-015: After first load hasLoadedRef listUserProjects is re-fetched to catch projects c
cp-016: Title save timer cleaned up on unmount via useEffect cleanup
cp-017: REPORTING_GUIDELINES constant maps document types to guideline arrays case_repor
cp-018: book_chapter academic_draft and letter have empty reporting guidelines arrays
cp-019: PrecisionEditAction type defines 14 precision edit actions rephrase shorten expa
cp-020: ScholarRules interface defines project-level AI configuration including dialect
cp-021: Section 1 check 264px Left sidebar is w-64 which is 256px 16rem not 264px
cp-022: Section 6 check Heading levels 14 StarterKit is configured with heading levels 1
cp-023: Section 8 check Messages render markdown content Messages are rendered as plain
cp-024: Section 15 checks CmdOpt1-4 for headings AcademicKeyboardShortcuts binds Mod-Shi
cp-025: Section 15 check Redo CtrlY Redo is bound as CmdShiftZ from StarterKit and shown
